title: Briful Artificial Orchid Plants White Orchid Real Touch Flowers Artificial Phalaenopsis Flower Stems in Gold Ceramic Pot Fake Orchid Flowers for Home Decor Wedding Table Centerpiece
features: UNIQUE DESIGN: Artificial orchids replicate the graceful bend and ruffled chain of blooms, offering a natural looking to your home decorations. Whether you're interested in a pre-arranged plant or want to create your own, we offer a variety of nature-inspired options to choose from.

PREMIUM MATERIAL: Orchid stems sitting in a gold brushed finish ceramic pot, this artificial orchid plant rises to the occasion with latex leafy accents and two long plastic stems holding a bounty of real touch flowers.

GREAT FOR INDOOR DECOR: Silk orchids artificial flowers are suitable for decoration in living rooms, bedrooms, kitchens, hotels, offices, etc. The ideal gifts for all kinds of festivals, and can also be used in 4 seasons. Almost lifted from a florist's inventory, this potted orchid plant bears a striking resemblance to its natural cousin.
POTTED FAKE ORCHID SIZE: With a flourish of oblong leaves, two long stems, and 7 blossoms with buds, this 12-inch orchid artificial flower almost looks realistic enough to water.
Whether it's a windowsill accent or a housewarming gift, this artificial orchid in a pot decor accent is the ideal faux selection. Various color options are available to meet your style requirements.
